macro.title: Century 21 Integra expands Chicago presence with acquisition
macro.what: With the acquisition, Century 21 Integra now operates Illinois offices in Schaumburg, Naperville and McHenry.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Monthly Payments Tick Up For First Time in 6 Months As Mortgage Rates, Home Prices Jump
macro.what: The Iran war is a major factor pushing up mortgage rates
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Texas SB 17 has reshaped foreign capital in homebuilding
housing.what: America’s largest homebuilders no longer just build subdivisions
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Join the most powerful room in housing at The Gathering April 27-30
housing.what: HousingWire’s The Gathering 2026 will run April 27-30 in Austin, bringing real estate, mortgage and homebuilding leaders into “the most powerful room in housing.”
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: PartnerOne finalizes acquisition of Mortgage Cadence
housing.what: PartnerOne has completed its acquisition of Mortgage Cadence, adding another long-standing mortgage technology platform to the portfolio of the global enterprise software group.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: What Washington state agents are seeing with new ‘millionaires tax’
housing.what: The law imposes a 9.9% tax on annual income above $1 million, with implementation expected in 2028 pending legal challenges.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: D.C. pushes single-stair apartments higher with added safety rules
housing.what: Washington, D.C., council members are leaning into a growing national trend by relaxing single-stairway rules to cut the cost of building small and mid-rise housing
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: FOA introduces second-lien reverse mortgage LOC in California
housing.what: Finance of America launches HomeSafe Second Line of Credit in California, a reverse second-lien alternative to HELOCs for older homeowners.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The Great Housing Mismatch: Empty Nesters Own 28% of the Nation’s Large Homes, Millennial Families Own 16%
housing.what: Empty-nest baby boomers own many more 3-bedroom-plus U.S
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: This $329,900 Long Island Tiny Home Is Going Viral Because It Has No Bedrooms
housing.what: A tiny home in New York is going viral on social media because it has no bedrooms
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Cleveland Remains a Beacon of Affordability for Homebuyers
housing.what: As many Americans consider buying a home this spring, they may want to take a closer look at the Cleveland metro area
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Over Half of Home Listings Have Been Lingering on the Market For More Than 2 Months
housing.what: In dollar terms, there’s $347 billion worth of stale listings in the U.S., more than ever before for this time of year
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Lower launches Movoto Advantage for solo real estate agents
notables.what: Lower rolled out Movoto Advantage, a subscription program with about 200 agents, routing live consumer transfers to one vetted agent per market.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: HECM activity rises in March, but proprietary loans are taking a bite out of business
notables.what: HECM endorsements rose 16.3% in March to 2,117, while HMBS issuance ticked up by $10 million from February to $441 million.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: NAR rolls out expertise-based application process for 2027 committees
notables.what: NAR launched an expertise profile and tailored application for its 2027 committees as it streamlines governance and increases transparency.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
